change_notes: Moved 'Madame' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is an honorific title, not a connective particle
Removed 'de' from given_names as it is already correctly captured in name_particles
Set is_organisation to true; 'Lehrergemeinschaft' (teachers' community/association) is an organisation
Removed duplicate 'Margareta' and 'Von Navarra' from family_name, set family_name to 'Navarra', moved 'von' to name_particles only (not 'Navarra' which is the family name)
Fixed typo in family_name ('Manddiargues' -> 'Mandiargues'); removed 'de' from given_names as it is already captured in name_particles
Moved 'Garcia' from given_names to family_name as compound surname; full name is Federico García Lorca where García is part of the family name
Normalized given_names from all-caps 'ALEXIOS V.' to 'Alexios V.'
Moved 'd. Ä.' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a generational suffix (der Ältere), not a connective particle
The particle 'von' is part of the hyphenated compound surname 'Leinz-von Dessauer', not a standalone connective particle; corrected family_name casing and cleared name_particles
Separated family_name: removed particles from 'Liselotte Von Der Pfalz' to 'Pfalz'; corrected name_particles to 'von der' (removing 'Pfalz' which is the family name)
Extracted 'du' from family_name 'Martin Du Gard' to name_particles; family_name is now 'Martin Gard'
Moved 'de' from family_name to name_particles; corrected family_name capitalization to 'Machado de Assis'
Moved 'Kaiser' to name_suffix; cleaned single_name to 'Maximilian I'; set family_name to null as this is a regnal name
Added space in given_names between 'G.' and 'Fritze' for proper formatting
